parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
participant "Line of Business" as LOB
participant ESB

box "Compliance IT" #LightGreen
participant Scoring
participant Recertification
end box

group Customer On-Boarding: Open a New Account
    LOB -> ESB : UpdatePartyKYC\nincludeScore=true
    alt Recertification completed
        LOB -> ESB : UpdatePartyKYC\nincludeScore=true\nrecertificationStatus=completed\nactor=<userid>\nreason=<one of client-initiated trigger codes>
    end
end

ESB -> Scoring : 1 score
note left
Schedule a new recertification and calculate its due date
OR retrieve due date of an existing recertification if
one has been previously scheduled and not yet
completed or cancelled
end note

Scoring -> Recertification : 2 recertify
activate Recertification

Recertification -> Recertification : 3 evaluate rules

group Recertification
    alt Recertification is Needed
        group Establish a Recertification
            Recertification -> Recertification : 4 schedule a new recertification
            alt Existing Recertification
                Recertification -> Recertification : retrieve a previously\n5 scheduled recertification\nthat hasn't been completed or cancelled
            end
        end
        alt Complete a Recertification
            Recertification -> Recertification : 6 complete an established recertification
            note right
            Immediately complete the
            recertification if the LOB
            told us it was already done
            end note
        end
        Recertification --> Scoring : 7 recertification details
        note left: Due date, status, recert id
        Scoring --> LOB : 8 score + recertification
    end
    alt Recertification is Not Needed
        Recertification --> Scoring : 9 no recertification
        Scoring --> LOB : 10 score
    end
end
deactivate Recertification

@enduml
```
